paragraphs.source: Intel unveiled its CPO roadmap in this year’s Intel Foundry Direct Connect and outlined a 4-stage development roadmap
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Intel unveiled its CPO roadmap in this year’s Intel Foundry Direct Connect and outlined a 4-stage development roadmap
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Intel unveiled its CPO roadmap in this year’s Intel Foundry Direct Connect and outlined a 4-stage development roadmap

pro.text: 英特尔在今年的英特尔晶圆代工厂直接对接大会上公布了其共封装光学（CPO）路线图，并规划了分四个阶段的发展路线。

issues.description: 译文存在翻译腔，'勾勒出一个四阶段的发展路线'不够自然流畅
句子过长且有轻微翻译腔，'作为光学集成的先导'与后续句子衔接不够顺畅
首次出现CPO后，后续段落重复标注'共封装光学（CPO）'，违反术语表中'首次出现时标注'的原则
程度词'great efficiency'被译为'出色效率'，力度略有升级，且表达可更自然
长句未充分拆分，存在明显翻译腔（'用于将...与...对接'），读起来较为拗口
将'targeting a breakthrough'译为'正在瞄准...突破'，语气略显激进，不够冷静客观
句子过长，'电互连瓶颈'和'芯粒架构'的搭配可更自然

paragraphs.source: 2023: In 2023, Intel outlined a concept for advanced electrical package-to-package I/O connectivity as a precursor to optical integration. This milestone focused on enabling high-bandwidth, short-reach electrical links directly between chip packages (bypassing traditional PCB traces) to support multi-die systems. It set the stage for integrating photonics by establishing a package-level I/O infrastructure that could later be augmented with optical channels.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **2023**: In 2023, Intel outlined a concept for advanced electrical package-to-package I/O connectivity as a precursor to optical integration. This milestone focused on enabling high-bandwidth, short-reach electrical links directly between chip packages (bypassing traditional PCB traces) to support multi-die systems. It set the stage for integrating photonics by establishing a package-level I/O infrastructure that could later be augmented with optical channels.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 2023: In 2023, Intel outlined a concept for advanced electrical package-to-package I/O connectivity as a precursor to optical integration. This milestone focused on enabling high-bandwidth, short-reach electrical links directly between chip packages (bypassing traditional PCB traces) to support multi-die systems. It set the stage for integrating photonics by establishing a package-level I/O infrastructure that could later be augmented with optical channels.

pro.text: 2023年：英特尔提出了一种先进的封装到封装电互连概念，作为光学集成的先导。该里程碑重点在于实现芯片封装之间的高带宽、短距离电链路（绕过传统的PCB走线），以支持多芯粒系统。它为后续集成光子技术奠定了基础，建立了可在后期通过光学通道增强的封装级I/O基础设施。

paragraphs.source: 2024: Intel demonstrated its first-generation CPO solution featuring direct fiber attach. In this approach, optical engine chiplets are coupled directly to optical fibers without any external connector, simplifying the link. At OFC 2024, Intel showcased a 4 Tbit/s (bi-directional) Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) chiplet co-packaged with a concept Xeon CPU, running error-free data over a single-mode fiber link and delivering 64 lanes at 32 Gbit/s each. The optical interface achieved great efficiency at ~5 pJ/bit.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **2024**: Intel demonstrated its first-generation CPO solution featuring direct fiber attach. In this approach, optical engine chiplets are coupled directly to optical fibers without any external connector, simplifying the link. At OFC 2024, Intel showcased a 4 Tbit/s (bi-directional) Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) chiplet co-packaged with a concept Xeon CPU, running error-free data over a single-mode fiber link and delivering 64 lanes at 32 Gbit/s each. The optical interface achieved great efficiency at ~5 pJ/bit.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 2024: Intel demonstrated its first-generation CPO solution featuring direct fiber attach. In this approach, optical engine chiplets are coupled directly to optical fibers without any external connector, simplifying the link. At OFC 2024, Intel showcased a 4 Tbit/s (bi-directional) Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) chiplet co-packaged with a concept Xeon CPU, running error-free data over a single-mode fiber link and delivering 64 lanes at 32 Gbit/s each. The optical interface achieved great efficiency at ~5 pJ/bit.

pro.text: 2024年：英特尔展示了其第一代共封装光学（CPO）解决方案，采用直接光纤贴附方式。在该方案中，光学引擎芯粒直接与光纤耦合，没有任何外部连接器，从而简化了链路。在OFC 2024大会上，英特尔展示了一款4 Tbit/s（双向）光计算互连（OCI）芯粒，该芯粒与概念验证Xeon CPU共封装，在单模光纤链路上实现无误码传输，每条通道速率为32 Gbit/s，共64条通道。其光学接口达到了约5 pJ/bit的出色效率。

paragraphs.source: 2025: Intel’s second-generation CPO solution incorporates a detachable optical package connector instead of permanent fiber pigtails. Intel engineers developed a glass optical bridge that slots into the side of the package, containing embedded 3D waveguides and mechanical alignment features to interface the on-package photonics with standard fiber connectors. This optical package connector design enables modular assembly, marking a transition toward a more connectorized, serviceable form factor.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **2025**: Intel’s second-generation CPO solution incorporates a detachable optical package connector instead of permanent fiber pigtails. Intel engineers developed a glass optical bridge that slots into the side of the package, containing embedded 3D waveguides and mechanical alignment features to interface the on-package photonics with standard fiber connectors. This optical package connector design enables modular assembly, marking a transition toward a more connectorized, serviceable form factor.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 2025: Intel’s second-generation CPO solution incorporates a detachable optical package connector instead of permanent fiber pigtails. Intel engineers developed a glass optical bridge that slots into the side of the package, containing embedded 3D waveguides and mechanical alignment features to interface the on-package photonics with standard fiber connectors. This optical package connector design enables modular assembly, marking a transition toward a more connectorized, serviceable form factor.

pro.text: 2025：英特尔的第二代共封装光学（CPO）解决方案采用可拆卸的光封装连接器，取代了永久性的光纤尾纤。英特尔工程师开发了一种玻璃光桥，可插入封装侧面。该光桥内置3D波导和机械对准结构，能够将封装内的光子器件与标准光纤连接器连接起来。这种光封装连接器设计实现了模块化组装，标志着向更易连接、可维护的形态过渡。

paragraphs.source: 2027: Intel is targeting a breakthrough in 3D-integrated photonics: vertically stacking photonic components using vertical expanded beam coupling. In this envisioned 3rd-generation design, optical I/O would be routed vertically between die layers (for example, between a photonic interposer layer and logic die) via short free-space or in-glass optical paths. By coupling light vertically through the package, Intel aims to further reduce electrical bottlenecks and enable ultra-high bandwidth chiplet fabrics in the latter part of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **2027**: Intel is targeting a breakthrough in 3D-integrated photonics: vertically stacking photonic components using vertical expanded beam coupling. In this envisioned 3rd-generation design, optical I/O would be routed vertically between die layers (for example, between a photonic interposer layer and logic die) via short free-space or in-glass optical paths. By coupling light vertically through the package, Intel aims to further reduce electrical bottlenecks and enable ultra-high bandwidth chiplet fabrics in the latter part of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 2027: Intel is targeting a breakthrough in 3D-integrated photonics: vertically stacking photonic components using vertical expanded beam coupling. In this envisioned 3rd-generation design, optical I/O would be routed vertically between die layers (for example, between a photonic interposer layer and logic die) via short free-space or in-glass optical paths. By coupling light vertically through the package, Intel aims to further reduce electrical bottlenecks and enable ultra-high bandwidth chiplet fabrics in the latter part of the decade.

pro.text: 2027: 英特尔计划在3D集成光子技术上实现突破：采用垂直扩展光束耦合方式垂直堆叠光子组件。在这一设想的第三代设计中，光学I/O将在裸片层之间（例如在光子中介层与逻辑裸片之间）通过短距离自由空间或玻璃内光路进行垂直路由。通过在封装内垂直耦合光信号，英特尔希望进一步缓解电气瓶颈，并在本十年后半段实现超高带宽的芯粒互连架构。
